studyName: Sequencing Analysis of Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma

tables.description: Sample ID, body site, analyte type, tumor status of sample, and histological type of samples obtained from participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Exome Sequencing Analysis of Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma" project.

variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Exome Sequencing Analysis of Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Exome Sequencing Analysis of Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma" project.
